comments: Approved. Criterion 1 satisfied: kickoff.md explicitly scopes V0.8.5 to the Serverless, Git-Driven, Headless Worktree architecture powered by MCP Context Spoofing and includes Clean Uninstall as a core requirement. Criterion 2 satisfied: milestone-map.md is structured into four logical phases: M1 Uninstall, M2 Worktree Manager, M3 MCP Filesystem Proxy, and M4 Documentation, with src/ changes limited to the dedicated implementation phases and documentation isolated after code work. Criterion 3 satisfied by repository verification: git status/diff evidence showed no current unstaged or staged modifications under src/, bin/, or workflow/dispatch.json, and the kickoff packet contains only planning artifacts before this review decision file. No active code modifications or dispatch semantic changes were detected during kickoff planning.
